positive: A symmetrical, central composition of bioluminescent flora intertwined with celestial astronomical elements. Imagine delicate, highly detailed root systems branching out into nebulae patterns, and glowing cosmic dust forming leaf veins. The style should be a blend of vintage scientific illustration and psychedelic art, utilizing crisp, clean linework and bold silhouettes. The color palette is dominated by deep indigo, velvety midnight blues, shimmering aqua turquoise, and pops of vivid magenta and gold. The overall aesthetic must be moody, ethereal, and deeply balanced, designed to look exquisite printed on fabric. Full focus on high contrast and visual depth, reminiscent of etching and glowing deep-sea life.
negative: blur, lowres, grainy, artifact, messy, watermark, signature, text, logo, dirty, sketch, simple background, extra limbs, bad anatomy, out of frame, jpeg artifacts
